description: Explore Münster on two wheels along its famous Promenade ring or riverside paths.

locationInfo.description: A 4.5 km tree-lined ring encircling the old city, beloved by cyclists and pedestrians alike.

description: Spot a variety of bird species around the reed beds and shores of the Aasee lake.

locationInfo.lighting: Open lakeside — best at dawn and dusk
locationInfo.description: The reed beds on the south bank of Aasee are a haven for waterfowl, herons, and migratory birds.

description: Capture stunning urban and nature shots on a guided self-tour of Münster's most photogenic spots.
groupSuitability: Perfect for solo explorers or pairs

locationInfo.lighting: Best in golden hour (early morning or late afternoon)
locationInfo.description: From the Lambertikirche to the Promenade elm trees, Münster offers countless photogenic corners.

description: Glide on the ice at Münster's main rink — great fun for all abilities in the winter months.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Münster's indoor ice rink offering public skating sessions throughout the winter season.

description: When snow falls, head to the gentle slopes near Münster for exhilarating sledding runs.

locationInfo.lighting: Open area — good natural light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A natural slope near the stadium that transforms into a popular sledding hill after snowfall.
safetyTips: Check slope for obstacles before sledding

description: Capture the city's frosty beauty — mist on the Aasee, frost-dusted trees in the Schloss garden.

locationInfo.lighting: Low winter light — ideal for moody shots
locationInfo.description: Cold mornings create stunning fog over the Aasee and frost on the baroque Schloss garden hedgerows.

description: A low-impact full-body workout using poles along Münster's flat trails.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Well-lit paths suitable for early mornings
locationInfo.description: Flat, paved routes with minimal traffic — ideal for Nordic walking technique.
safetyTips: Use rubber tips on poles to protect pavement
Warm up wrists and shoulders first

description: Use GPS to hunt for hidden caches scattered around Münster's parks and landmarks.

locationInfo.lighting: Varies by cache location — most are accessible in daylight
locationInfo.description: Hundreds of geocaches hidden across Münster — from the city centre to forests and cycle paths.
safetyTips: Download the Geocaching app before you go
Return the cache exactly as found

description: A gentle stroll through quiet woodland and fields, soaking up the natural surroundings.

locationInfo.lighting: Open reserve — good natural light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A UNESCO-recognised wetland reserve north of Münster, home to rare birds and wildflowers.
safetyTips: Stick to marked paths to protect nesting wildlife

description: Browse stalls, sip Glühwein, and enjoy the festive atmosphere of Münster's winter market.

locationInfo.description: One of Germany's most charming Christmas markets, set against the historic gabled townhouses of the Prinzipalmarkt.
safetyTips: Keep bags close in crowded areas
Be aware of open fire hazards near stalls
